businessGoals: Create an entertaining, interactive personal website
Evoke 90s web nostalgia with modern tech
Showcase personality through absurdist British comedy
userPersonas: Casual web visitor who enjoys retro aesthetics and humor
functionalRequirements: R001: Canvas-based tile map rendering (DONE - feature-001)
R002: Arrow-key character movement with collision (DONE - feature-002)
R003: Title screen with 'Welcome to the Realm' (DONE - feature-003)
R005: Fantasy + sci-fi themed world (DONE - feature-005)
R007: Themed NPCs and content (PENDING - feature-007)
R009: Scrolling camera with larger world map (NEW)
R010: Mouse cursor particle trail / stars (NEW)
R011: British comedy tone across all content (MODIFICATION to 006/007)

feasibilityAssessment: Camera scrolling: Medium complexity - requires viewport offset tracking and map expansion
Mouse cursor trail: Low complexity - canvas particle system following mouse events
British comedy: Content/writing change, no architecture impact
implementationOrder: feature-009 (scrolling camera) - enables larger world needed for content
feature-010 (mouse cursor trail) - independent, can parallel anything
feature-006 (dialogue - already pending, update for British tone)
feature-007 (NPCs - already pending, update for British tone)

edgeCases: Camera at world edge should stop scrolling
Particle trail performance on mobile/low-end devices
Mouse leaving canvas area should stop trail gracefully
